svg.title: Confidential AI inference reference architecture
svg.desc: Flow showing client traffic entering the Intel IPU which runs NGINX Plus and handles all security, separated by an air gap from the host server running OpenVINO AI models, all orchestrated by Red Hat OpenShift via OPI APIs.

g.text: Manages IPU lifecycle via OPI vendor-agnostic APIs · unified Kubernetes control plane
Intel IPU E2100 — ARM Compute Complex
offloaded here — zero host CPU overhead
DevOps deploys & scales AI models on host
